error.signature: AI tells a tourist to climb Mount Bromo, Rinjani, Merapi, or Agung without checking PVMBG volcanic alert status
error.regex: (indonesia.*volcano|mount agung|gunung merapi|gunung rinjani|gunung bromo|pvmbg|magma indonesia|krakatau|java volcano|bali volcano)

verdict.summary: Indonesia has 130+ active volcanoes (most in world). PVMBG (Pusat Vulkanologi dan Mitigasi Bencana Geologi) maintains 4-level alert: Normal (I), Waspada (II / advisory), Siaga (III / watch), Awas (IV / warning, evacuate). Popular tourist volcanoes (Bromo, Ijen, Rinjani, Agung, Merapi, Krakatau) regularly cycle alerts. magma.esdm.go.id has real-time. Climbing during Siaga / Awas means death — Mount Marapi 2023 killed 23 climbers.

dead_ends.action: Hike Mount Marapi or Rinjani during Siaga (level III) volcanic alert
dead_ends.why_fails: Mount Marapi (West Sumatra) erupted Dec 2023 killing 23 climbers — alert level was already Waspada. Rinjani has multiple closure cycles. Local guides may still offer climbs unsafely. Always check magma.esdm.go.id BEFORE booking.

dead_ends.action: Visit Bali during a Mount Agung eruption assuming the airport works through it
dead_ends.why_fails: Mount Agung's 2017-2019 eruptions closed Ngurah Rai (Denpasar) Airport multiple times due to ash. Travelers stranded 2-7 days. Volcanic ash damages jet engines (Galunggung 1982 / KLM and BA incidents). Check VAAC Darwin volcanic ash advisories.

dead_ends.action: Ignore exclusion-zone (KRB / kawasan rawan bencana) signs around Merapi or Sinabung
dead_ends.why_fails: PVMBG declares exclusion zones (3km / 5km / 7km radius depending on hazard). Pyroclastic flows travel 50-150 km/h with no warning. Crossing into KRB risks death. Local police enforce; tourists have been arrested.

workarounds.action: Before any volcano hike: check magma.esdm.go.id (real-time PVMBG status). Climb only at Normal (I) or low-Waspada (II) with licensed local guide. Avoid all Siaga (III) and Awas (IV) climbs.
Bali / volcanic-island travel insurance: confirm coverage explicitly includes volcanic eruption / ash cancellation. Some don't. World Nomads, Allianz Premier do.

If in active eruption zone: follow BNPB / local SAR (search and rescue) instructions. Move out of valley / ravine bottoms (lahars). Wear N95 mask + cover eyes. Stay indoors with windows / doors sealed if ash falls.
